opportunities.name: podcast-commerce-mcp
opportunities.tagline: Extract product mentions and recommendations from podcasts
opportunities.problem: Podcasts mention products constantly but there's no structured way for agents to extract and monetize these mentions. Podcast transcripts are long and noisy.
opportunities.solution: Long-form transcript processing optimized for conversational content. Speaker attribution. Product mention extraction with sentiment and recommendation strength.

channels.notes: Share in appropriate channel. Engage with feedback.

promotion.launchStrategy: Broad launch — podcasts cross all verticals. Target podcast analytics companies, recommendation engine builders. Show HN potential.

opportunities.moat: Speaker attribution + sentiment analysis on recommendations is hard to replicate. Long-form processing expertise transfers from video-commerce-mcp.

opportunities.name: course-commerce-mcp
opportunities.tagline: Extract learning paths and resources from educational videos
opportunities.problem: Educational videos reference books, tools, courses, and resources that viewers want to buy. No agent can extract structured learning paths from video content.
opportunities.solution: Extract educational resources (books, courses, tools, software), build skill dependency graphs, match to purchasable resources. Score learning path completeness.

opportunities.name: recipe-commerce-mcp
opportunities.tagline: Turn cooking videos into shoppable ingredient lists
opportunities.problem: Cooking video viewers can't easily buy exact ingredients shown. Recipe extraction is poor, ingredient-to-product matching doesn't exist for agents.
opportunities.solution: Extract recipes, match to grocery/specialty products, score affiliate opportunities. Same pipeline architecture as video-commerce-mcp adapted for food.

mvpScope: Product matching to major grocery categories
Affiliate link generation for specialty ingredients

opportunities.name: diy-commerce-mcp
opportunities.tagline: Extract tools, materials, and supply lists from DIY videos
opportunities.problem: DIY/home improvement video viewers need specific tools and materials but can't easily get shopping lists. Hardware affiliate programs are underserved.
opportunities.solution: Extract tools, materials, measurements from DIY transcripts. Match to hardware store products. Score project complexity and cost estimates.

marketTrends: MCP adoption accelerating — Claude, Cursor, Windsurf all support natively
Agent-to-agent commerce emerging — agents buying services from other agents
x402 micropayment protocol gaining traction for per-call pricing
Vertical-specific MCPs outperform generic ones — domain expertise matters
Content commerce (video/podcast → purchase) is underserved by current agent tools
Multi-modal agents need structured data extraction — video is the biggest gap
nextActions: Review video-commerce-mcp usage patterns for signal on which verticals agents request
Check MCP directories for new competitors in content commerce space
14-day traction window: build MVP of podcast-commerce-mcp and measure adoption
If no traction after 14 days, pivot to next opportunity on the list
Publish on MCP registries: mcp.so, Smithery, npm, GitHub MCP servers list
